2008.issue: [S2008] Version 5.0.0 tagged as "latest" at npm is not signed with provenance. Trusted publishing is recommended.

3012.issue: [S3012] Workflow "test-and-release.yml": job "deploy" is not defined. Consider adding it for automated releases.

5004.issue: [S5004] Plain setInterval() found in source files (main.js). Please use this.setInterval() or adapter.setInterval() instead.

5005.issue: [S5005] Plain setTimeout() found in source files (main.js). Please use this.setTimeout() or adapter.setTimeout() instead.

5612.issue: [W5612] "admin/jsonConfig.json/items/ignorelist" attribute "placeholder" uses key "VIN1,VIN2,VIN3" which is not found in the English translation file at "admin/i18n/en".

6023.issue: [W6023] Sentry plugin is configured in [io-package.json](https://github.com/TA2k/ioBroker.bmw/blob/master/io-package.json) but the required Sentry information was not found in [README.md](https://github.com/TA2k/ioBroker.bmw/blob/master/README.md). Please add the standard Sentry notice near the top of [README.md](https://github.com/TA2k/ioBroker.bmw/blob/master/README.md).

8005.issue: [S8005] No GitHub release found. Please use GitHub releases for easier identification of the current release and consider using "@iobroker/action-deploy".

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^25.6.2" at [package.json](https://github.com/TA2k/ioBroker.bmw/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 22. Downgrade to node.js 22.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.
